content: Break TAURI006 into sub-tasks in progress.txt
TAURI006a - Rust-side: search_files, open_file, reveal commands
TAURI006b - Update capabilities + install JS packages
TAURI006c - Extend PlatformAPI with file system interface
TAURI006d - Wire FileSearchView to real platform operations
Run bun run check and fix issues
Fix review issues: security, debounce, IDs, trash, error handling
Run bun run check + cargo check after fixes
